mapper.select: SELECT file_id , project_id , version_id , file_code , original_name , stored_name , file_path , file_size , upload_user_id , upload_date , file_version , file_use_yn , connect_address FROM attach_file ORDER BY upload_date DESC

SELECT file_id , project_id , version_id , file_code , original_name , stored_name , file_path , file_size , upload_user_id , upload_date , file_version , file_use_yn , connect_address FROM attach_file WHERE upload_user_id = #{uploadUserId} ORDER BY upload_date DESC

SELECT file_id , project_id , version_id , file_code , original_name , stored_name , file_path , file_size , upload_user_id , upload_date , file_version , file_use_yn , connect_address FROM attach_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
